findings.title: __import__ in SANDBOX_BUILTINS enables forbidden-module loading bypassing Stage 1 AST check
findings.description: sandbox_builtins.py:29 includes live __import__. sandbox_runner.py:739 injects it as module.__builtins__. Strategy code aliases it (f=__import__) and calls f(forbidden_module); the alias AST node is not ast.Name(__import__) so Stage 1 passes. All FORBIDDEN_MODULES reachable. Confirmed.
findings.suggested_fix: Replace raw __import__ with filtered _safe_import that raises ImportError when module root in FORBIDDEN_MODULES.

findings.title: Memory monitor compares whole-process RSS with no baseline; valid strategies rejected in long loops
findings.description: _mem_poll() lines 103-122 compares proc RSS against 512MB with no baseline. __init__ lines 78-87 does not record baseline_rss. In long loops prior-gen residual RSS accumulates causing all new strategies to fail MemoryError. Confirmed.
findings.suggested_fix: In __init__ add self._baseline_rss = psutil.Process().memory_info().rss. In _mem_poll check: if (rss - self._baseline_rss) > _MEM_LIMIT_BYTES.

findings.title: Stage 3 exception threshold is absolute count 4; broken strategies with TypeError or AttributeError may pass
findings.description: run_sandbox() lines 389-407 fails only at count>=5. 4/200 bars crashing gets PASS+WARNING lines 420-423. TypeError and AttributeError are deterministic bugs. No rate-based gate. Confirmed.
findings.suggested_fix: Post-loop: exception_rate = len(result.exceptions_caught) / bars_tested; if > 0.01 set passed=False. Immediately FAIL on TypeError or AttributeError.

findings.title: _SimpleFeatureStore NaN fallback invisible to run_layer1; broken strategy may reach Layer 2
findings.description: vectorbt_engine.py lines 362-376: non-ValueError indicator exceptions fill NaN and append to _feature_compute_errors. run_layer1 lines 785-844 never checks _feature_compute_errors. Strategy runs on NaN features and may pass L1 thresholds. Confirmed no read-side check.
findings.suggested_fix: After _generate_signals_vectorized in run_layer1: if getattr(feature_store, _feature_compute_errors, None): return Layer1Result(passed=False, error=str(feature_store._feature_compute_errors)).

findings.title: L2 param-sensitivity trial failures at DEBUG only; all-failure returns None silently
findings.description: _run_l2_param_sensitivity line 1222 uses logger.debug. At INFO level all failures invisible. When all fail len(pfs)<5 returns None (line 1228) and Gate 11 fails silently. Lines 1137/1153 were raised to warning in Round 1 but exc_info=True missing. Line 1222 remains debug. Confirmed.
findings.suggested_fix: Line 1222: raise to logger.warning with exc_info=True. Lines 1137 and 1153: add exc_info=True to existing logger.warning calls.

findings.title: equity[0]<=0 fallback total_return_pct=0.0 enables false Gate 13 PASS in bear-market periods
findings.description: _compute_metrics lines 832-840: equity[0]<=0 sets total_return_pct=0.0. bh_excess_return_pct line 881: 0.0 - bh_return_pct * exposure. When bh_return_pct negative (e.g. -10 pct exposure=0.3) result is +3.0 passing Gate 13. Corrupted BT falsely shows alpha. Confirmed lines 832 and 881.
findings.suggested_fix: When equity[0]<=0 set total_return_pct=None and bh_excess_return_pct=None. _check() returns False for None; Gate 13 correctly fails.

findings.title: on_fill called with raw dict instead of FillEvent Pydantic model; type safety bypassed at all call sites
findings.description: event_simulator.py calls strategy.on_fill() with raw dicts at lines 516-518, 538, 585-590, 598, 607. FillEvent model exists in models.py:123-129 but never used. CLAUDE.md forbids dict[str,Any] direct passing. FLAT fills omit size key. Untrusted strategy on_fill feeding position state has no validation. NEW finding Round 2.
findings.suggested_fix: At all on_fill call sites construct FillEvent(...).model_dump() and pass that dict. Update Strategy ABC on_fill annotation to accept FillEvent or dict.

findings.title: TradeSignal and StrategyConfig lack extra=forbid; extra fields from untrusted code silently accepted
findings.description: models.py TradeSignal line 62 and StrategyConfig line 84 use Pydantic v2 default extra=ignore. Untrusted generate_signal() returning TradeSignal with extra fields validates without error. No ConfigDict(extra=forbid) present. CLAUDE.md mandates thorough Pydantic I/O validation. Confirmed no ConfigDict in models.py.
findings.suggested_fix: Add model_config = ConfigDict(extra=forbid) to TradeSignal and StrategyConfig. FillEvent may keep extra=ignore for dict compatibility.
